title: settings.source-override.set
description: Set a per-source override for an overridable settings key. To clear an override, omit 'value' or call the dedicated clear operation (out of scope here).

source_id.description: Identifier of the data source root receiving the override.

key.description: One of the overridable settings keys.

value.description: Override value; must validate against the same per-key sub-schema as the global key.

errors.message: The supplied source_id does not match a known data source root.
The supplied key cannot be overridden per source in v1.
